name: regression-tests
description: Single-plugin marketplace for the regression-tests multi-agent test workflow plugin.

plugins.name: regression-tests
plugins.description: Multi-agent regression-test workflow that locks current behavior of code. Ten specialist agents (coverage planning, parallel test authoring, adversarial specialist team + synthesis, mutation testing, fuzzing) and a Rust CLI `regression-tests` exposing the deterministic helpers. Supports Rust and C#.
